title: restricted-areas-data pipeline configuration
description: Filtering and simplification controls for the Navigator -> regional FlatGeobuf pipeline. Exclusion defaults are LOCKED; see README for the measured justification.

excludeCategories.description: Area Category ids to drop. 9 = Jurisdictional Authority Area (EEZ overlays, not a restriction).

excludePartitions.description: Source partitions to drop. HighSeas = RFMO/basin overlays spanning entire ocean basins.

maxAreaKm2WithoutHardBan.description: Drop any polygon larger than this unless it carries a hard transit ban (entry===1 or anchoring===1).

displayToleranceDeg.description: Douglas-Peucker tolerance in degrees for the display (simplified) FGB.

displayPrecision.description: Decimal places to round display coordinates to.

regionsFile.description: Path (repo-relative) to the ocean-basin regions GeoJSON used by region-tag.
